props.title: To start accepting recurring payments, please activate a payment method that supports it.

examples.name: ActionRequired

props.rawHtml: We will stop using Cards (by Adyen) soon. To prevent payment disruptions, complete your onboarding to the new payment method "Cards" by 21 Nov '25.

examples.code:

          class="gap-5 w-full pl-5"
          title-class="flex-1 font-normal"
          :chip-props="args.chipProps"

          :secondary-button="{
            label: 'View guide',
            class: 'underline'
          }"
          @click:button="onClick"
        />
      </Theme>
